# Acme Corporation Annual Report 2024

## Executive Summary
Acme Corporation delivered strong performance in fiscal year 2024, with revenue reaching $168.4 million, a 15% increase from the prior year. Our strategic investments in AI and cloud infrastructure positioned us for continued growth.

## Financial Highlights

### Revenue
- Total Revenue: $168.4 million
- Q1: $38.2 million
- Q2: $41.1 million
- Q3: $42.1 million
- Q4: $47.0 million

### Profitability
- Gross Profit: $114.8 million (68.2% margin)
- Operating Income: $28.6 million (17.0% margin)
- Net Income: $22.4 million
- Earnings Per Share (Diluted): $2.41

### Balance Sheet
- Total Assets: $245.6 million
- Cash and Equivalents: $38.7 million
- Total Debt: $45.2 million
- Shareholders' Equity: $142.8 million

### Key Ratios
- Debt-to-Equity: 0.32
- Current Ratio: 2.8
- Return on Equity: 15.7%

## Business Segments

### Technology Solutions
- Revenue: $98.4 million (58% of total)
- Growth: 18% YoY
- Key driver: Cloud migration services

### Professional Services
- Revenue: $45.2 million (27% of total)
- Growth: 12% YoY
- Key driver: AI consulting

### Licensing
- Revenue: $24.8 million (15% of total)
- Growth: 8% YoY
- Key driver: Enterprise subscriptions

## Geographic Distribution
- North America: $102.4 million (61%)
- Europe: $38.4 million (23%)
- Asia Pacific: $27.6 million (16%)

## Research and Development
- R&D Spending: $18.2 million (10.8% of revenue)
- Focus areas: AI/ML, cloud infrastructure, security
- Patents filed: 12

## Corporate Governance
- Board of Directors: 9 members
- Independent Directors: 7
- Board diversity: 33% women, 22% underrepresented minorities

## Human Capital
- Total Employees: 1,247
- New Hires: 186
- Employee Retention Rate: 89%
- Training Hours: 12,400

## Risk Factors
- Economic uncertainty and potential recession
- Competitive pressures in cloud market
- Cybersecurity threats
- Regulatory changes in data privacy

## Forward-Looking Statements
We expect continued growth in FY2025, with projected revenue of $195-205 million. Key investments will focus on AI capabilities and international expansion.

---
Report prepared: March 15, 2024
Approved by: Board of Directors
